answer: Apple's 2025 annual revenue was $416.2 billion, a 6% increase from 2024. This growth was driven by strong iPhone and Services sales.

results.title: [PDF] Apple Full Year 2025 Report - Savest Financial
results.snippet: Though Apple hasn’t issued fiscal 2026 guidance, it expects revenue growth from strong iPhone and Services demand and new product launches. GUIDANCE CEO’s Commentary Apple delivered a September quarter revenue record of $102.5 billion, driven by record iPhone and Services performance, said Tim Cook, CEO. Margin and Efficiency Analysis MILLION USD Q4 2025 ESTIMATE BEAT/MISS REVENUE 102.00B 102.00B 0.20% EBITDA 35.30B 34.70B 1.70% EBIT 32.40B 31.70B 2.40% EPS 1.85 1.77 4.50% Expectation Analysis Performance Highlights Apple achieved record fiscal 2025 revenue of $416.2 billion, up 6% YoY, driven by robust iPhone and Services sales. iPhone revenue rose 4% to $209.6 billion, led by strong demand for premium iPhone 17 Pro and Pro Max models. Gross margin (46.91%) remained solid, supported by favorable product mix and operational efficiency, while operating margin (32.27%) and net income margin (27.21%) improved year-over-year, underscoring disciplined cost management and revenue leverage.

results.title: Press release issued by Apple Inc. on July 31, 2025. - SEC.gov
results.snippet: June quarter records for total company revenue, iPhone revenue and EPS. “Today Apple is proud to report a June quarter revenue record with double-digit growth in iPhone, Mac and Services and growth around the world, in every geographic segment,” said Tim Cook, Apple’s CEO.
